rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Cross-Complaint Of Liverpool Lils And Gilbert Hodges
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 26, 2018 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT RESTAURANT DESIGN CONCEPTS, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Cross-Complaint Of Liverpool Lils And Gilbert Hodges GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint was filed on violation of June 22, 2017 order and without leave of Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL S. ZAPPETINI ET AL VS. JOHN MCCAIN KIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 26, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL ZAPPETINI, DAVID ZAPPETINI, STEVE ZAPPETINI & SON, INC. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for August 16, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIA SCHAEFER ET AL VS. CALIFORNIA AND PIERCE APARTMENTS, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate Issues Of Liability And Punitive Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 26, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA AND PIERCE APARTMENTS, LP, EVERETT ASCHER, MARY ASCHER, MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate Issues Of Liability And Punitive Damages OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1013, i.e. motion set on 16-court days without accounting for electronic service. Additionally, issue of bifurcation shall be raised before the trial judge. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 26, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT HARRIETT WILSON, THE HARRIETT M. WILSON TRUST DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to August 22, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, reply and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than July 31, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRUE GOSPEL MISSIONARY BAPTIST CHURCH VS. ROBERT W COOK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re: Osc Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday July 26, 2018 line 6. Re: Osc Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order OFF CALENDAR.
